description: Composition White shirt made of 100% cotton, has a black pinstriped yoke extending to the spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full length buttoned placket, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak or bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/embroidery This classic white shirt is given a fashionable twist with black pinstriped yoke. A fab off beat design that the metrosexual men can revel in, this shirt from probase looks great when paired with denims and oxfords. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11” and shoulders 17.5”
